name: Tammy Duckworth
stanceSummary: Duckworth has supported diplomacy to restore a mutual ceasefire and expand humanitarian aid, while explicitly pairing this with Israel security and hostage-release goals. Track AIPAC reports Israel Lobby funding for this candidacy.

timeline.event: Track AIPAC congressional listing records Israel Lobby Total: $2,639,142.
Public statements and congressional record context were reviewed for stance updates.
Senate statement backed diplomacy for hostage release and ceasefire restoration alongside expanded humanitarian aid to Gaza.
